info.title: Deterministic versioning and publishing for .NET monorepos.

commands.name: publish
commands.description: p  Publishes changed projects to configured NuGet sources. Pipeline: discover → detect changes → build current → resolve base DLLs → compare → compute version → pack → push → tag.

options.name: --sources
options.description: (Default: '[]') -- NuGet source names to push packages to. Defaults to "main" if empty.

options.name: --remote
options.description: (Default: origin) -- Git remote name for tag resolution and fetch operations.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
(Default: False) -- Log actions without modifying the filesystem, Git state, or NuGet registries.
--ignore-access-modifiers -i  (Default: False) -- Include internal member changes (for InternalsVisibleTo).

options.name: --sign
options.description: (Default: ) -- Certificate fingerprint for signing .nupkg files before push.

options.name: --rolling-branch
options.description: (Default: latest) -- Branch pointer to force-update on release. Empty string disables.

options.name: --api-key
options.description: (Default: ) -- API key for authenticated NuGet push operations.

options.name: --sources
options.description: (Default: '[]') -- NuGet source names to push packages to. Defaults to "main" if empty.

options.name: --remote
options.description:
(Default: origin) -- Git remote name for tag resolution and fetch operations.
--tag-prefix -t  (Default: v) -- Prefix for version tags.
